columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Event timestamp mapped from the API timestamp field.

columns.name: Id
columns.description: Stable deterministic UUID for this record. Safe for deduplication.

columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: Event timestamp in ISO 8601 UTC format. Records span roughly the last 48 hours relative to current server time.

columns.name: SourceIp
columns.description: Source IP address of the network flow (IPv4).

columns.name: DestinationIp
columns.description: Destination IP address of the network flow (IPv4).

columns.name: SourcePort
columns.description: Source port number. 0 for ICMP.

columns.name: DestinationPort
columns.description: Destination port number. 0 for ICMP.

columns.name: Protocol
columns.description: Network protocol. Values: TCP, UDP, ICMP.

columns.name: Action
columns.description: Firewall disposition. Values: ALLOW, DENY, DROP.

columns.name: BytesIn
columns.description: Bytes received (inbound). 0 for blocked sessions.

columns.name: BytesOut
columns.description: Bytes sent (outbound). 0 for blocked sessions.

columns.name: Packets
columns.description: Total packet count for the flow.

columns.name: DurationMs
columns.description: Flow duration in milliseconds. 0 for blocked sessions.

columns.name: NetworkZone
columns.description: Network segment. Values: internal, dmz, external.

columns.name: DeviceId
columns.description: Identifier of the reporting device (e.g. fw-001).

columns.name: DeviceName
columns.description: Human-readable device name (e.g. Firewall-Primary).

columns.name: RuleName
columns.description: Name of the firewall rule that matched this flow.

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: Event severity. Values: Low, Medium, High, Critical.

columns.name: Category
columns.description: Traffic category. Values: Web, DNS, SSH, RDP, Email, Database, CloudStorage, VPN, NetworkOps, Recon, Malware, LateralMovement.

columns.name: ThreatIndicator
columns.description: Threat intelligence tag if applicable. Examples: BruteForce, C2Server, RDPBruteForce, PortScan, KnownScanner, LargeUpload, WannaCry. Null for benign events.

columns.name: GeoCountry
columns.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the external IP. Null for internal-only flows.
